---
title: "Harvard Business Publishing eBooks Collection"
page-layout: article
---

# Harvard Business Publishing eBooks Collection

**Provider:** EBSCO

## Description

Ebook collection covering management, leadership, entrepreneurship, strategy, human resources, and related business topics. Useful for teaching, professional development, and business research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, Government & International Statistics, Scholarly Indexes & Literature
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, Government & International Statistics, Scholarly Indexes & Literature

## Links

- [Access resource](https://yale.idm.oclc.org/login?url=https://search.ebscohost.com/login.aspx?authtype=ip,uid&custid=s5164239&groupid=main&profile=ehost&defaultdb=e076mww)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
